scripts.qa:smoke: node scripts/run-playwright-suite.mjs --port=4175 tests/smoke tests/navigation tests/contact/contact.spec.ts tests/legal tests/seo tests/labs tests/performance --project chromium --grep-invert @qa-mock
scripts.qa:contact: node scripts/check-contact-system.mjs && node scripts/run-playwright-suite.mjs --port=4176 --contact-mock=1 tests/contact/contact.spec.ts --project chromium
scripts.qa:privacy: node scripts/check-privacy-storage.mjs && node scripts/run-playwright-suite.mjs --port=4177 tests/contact/contact.spec.ts --project chromium --grep "runtime stores no personal data|do not persist after reload|stays honestly blocked"
scripts.qa:seo: node scripts/check-seo.mjs && node scripts/run-playwright-suite.mjs --port=4178 tests/seo tests/navigation/navigation.spec.ts --project chromium
scripts.qa:legal: node scripts/check-legal-readiness.mjs && node scripts/run-playwright-suite.mjs --port=4179 tests/legal tests/navigation/navigation.spec.ts --project chromium
scripts.qa:full: node scripts/run-playwright-suite.mjs --port=4182 --contact-mock=1 tests/smoke tests/navigation tests/contact tests/legal tests/seo tests/labs tests/accessibility tests/performance --project chromium
